name: Bread and Fig Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice figs into small pieces and set aside.
2. Make a custard by heating the milk and pouring it onto the eggs and sugar. Cook until the mixture is just thick enough to coat the spoon.
3. Dip crustless slices of bread in milk; place a layer in a pudding dish (casserole), cover with figs, and pour over enough custard to cover. Repeat until the dish is full, ensuring there is enough custard for the bread to be completely soaked.
4. Cover the dish and bake at 180°C until the custard is set (about an hour, but keep checking).
5. Serve warm with hard sauce.
Difficulty: easy
Precision: measure ingredients
